raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Open context","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Maria set the agenda before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rituals shift","name":"How have the team rituals felt for you lately?","description":"Surfaces whether her drop in participation reflects a change in fit, energy, or something else.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Selection readout","name":"What readout did you get on why you weren’t selected?","description":"Checks whether she received a concrete explanation rather than vague feedback.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Current direction","name":"What kind of growth are you actually looking for next?","description":"Moves from general ambition to the specific shape of growth she wants now.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Principal scope","name":"What would you want your scope to look like at the next level?","description":"Surfaces the concrete scope shift she wants, not just the title.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring role","name":"What is mentoring doing for you right now?","description":"Tests whether mentoring is strategic development or a place to park energy.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Evidence gap","name":"What evidence would make the next step feel real to you?","description":"Surfaces the concrete signals she needs before she can believe in a path forward.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoffs ahead","name":"What would you be willing to trade off to make space for that growth?","description":"Forces a real investment conversation about time, focus, and priorities.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What kind of support from me would actually change the game for you?","description":"Clarifies what managerial support would be meaningful rather than generic.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next move","name":"What’s the first concrete thing you want to move before we talk again?","description":"Closes on a specific commitment and turns the conversation into an action.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
